_comment: Mutation testing for the highest-stakes classification / comp-scoring code paths. Manual command (npm run test:mutation) -- not a CI gate. See BACKLOG #239.

jest._comment: enableFindRelatedTests is intentionally false: code-reviewer flagged a tension with coverageAnalysis:perTest where transitive-only imports could be wrongly skipped, inflating mutation scores. Accuracy beats runtime for a baseline tool.
